channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: IHC Imposes Fine on NAB Over Delays in £190m Al-Qadir Trust Case Against Imran Khan and Bushra Bibi
item.description: On Wednesday, the Islamabad High Court (IHC) slapped a fine of Rs100,000 on the National Accountability Bureau (NAB) for deliberately delaying proceedings in the £190 million Al-Qadir Trust corruption...

item.title: Electronic Warfare Disrupts GPS Signals, Affecting Navigation and Civilian Services in the Gulf
item.description: Recent reports from countries in the Gulf Cooperation Council indicate that electronic warfare activities near Iran are causing widespread disruptions to GPS-dependent services. Users have observed de...

item.title: PM urges standardised crop trade and instant payments for farmers
item.description: Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has instructed ministries responsible for crop trade, together with the Weights and Measures Agency (WMA) and buyers, to create a clear roadmap that ensures farmers g...

item.title: Regional Australian farmers struggle with diesel shortages amid rising prices
item.description: Farmers across regional Australia are facing mounting difficulties obtaining diesel, critical for operating machinery needed for planting, harvesting, and disease control. Robert Fenwick, owner of Her...

item.title: Study Shows Early Response Limited Impact of Calgary Daycare E. coli Outbreak
item.description: A study from the University of Calgary highlights how a coordinated public health response to an E. coli outbreak at multiple Calgary daycare centres in 2023 helped prevent severe health outcomes amon...

item.title: Orlando Pirates aim to maintain strong home form against Richards Bay
item.description: Orlando Pirates are determined to silence doubters as they host Richards Bay at Orlando Amstel Arena tonight at 7:30pm. Recent comments from Polokwane City coach Phuti Mohafe and Golden Arrows coach M...

item.title: EFCC detains 15 over illegal transport of radioactive minerals in Kaduna
item.description: Operatives from the Kaduna Zonal Office of the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) don arrest fifteen men wey dem suspect say dey involved for illegal movement of so-called radioactive sol...

item.title: Kenya Approves 2026/27 National Budget Framework of Sh4.7 Trillion
item.description: Nairobi — Parliament has given the nod to the 2026/2027 Budget Policy Statement, paving the way for the final national budget and setting spending priorities for the next financial year. The total bud...

item.title: Collingwood Magpies' disciplined style keeps them competitive despite predictions
item.description: Collingwood’s Magpies have consistently proven pundits wrong with their structured and disciplined style under coach Craig McRae. Despite predictions placing them lower on the ladder for the 2026 AFL ...

item.title: Canadiens secure 3-1 win over Maple Leafs with Kapanen scoring 20th of season
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens earned a 3-1 victory over the Toronto Maple Leafs on Tuesday night, marking the Leafs’ eighth consecutive loss. Oliver Kapanen opened the scoring early in the first period, fini...

item.title: Woman Shocked After Discovering Husband Keeps Record of Her Mistakes in Diary
item.description: A Kenyan woman, known as Daisy, shared her concern online after she discovered that her husband had been keeping a detailed diary of all her mistakes. The couple had briefly dated in the past and had ...

item.title: Australian Safe House for Iranian Footballers Breached After One Player Reverses Asylum Decision
item.description: Australia's safe house for Iranian female footballers was compromised after one of the women seeking refuge changed her mind and contacted the Iranian Embassy. Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke confirm...

item.title: US authorities increase reward to $1 million for Indian man wanted in wife's murder case
item.description: US authorities have raised the reward for information leading to the capture of Bhadreshkumar Chetanbhai Patel, an Indian national wanted in connection with the murder of his wife, to one million US d...

item.title: Rosslyn BMW plant reaches milestone with 100,000th fourth-generation X3
item.description: BMW Group’s Rosslyn plant, located just north of Pretoria, has achieved a significant milestone by producing its 100,000th fourth-generation BMW X3. This particular model, a Fire Red X3 plug-in hybrid...

item.title: China’s AI plan aims to boost jobs while managing long-term employment risks
item.description: China is banking on a massive, society-wide rollout of artificial intelligence to help create new jobs and support its slowing economy, even as global experts warn of major disruptions to work. Policy...

item.title: Landslides Block Karakoram Highway After Heavy Rain and Snowfall in GB
item.description: Gilgit-Baltistan is facing severe weather conditions as fresh rain and snowfall have triggered landslides at multiple locations along the Karakoram Highway (KKH). The Diamer and Kohistan districts are...

item.title: Historical Challenges of Achieving Regime Change Through Air Power
item.description: The article analyzes the limitations of relying on air power alone to achieve regime change, focusing on the recent U.S. and Israeli military actions against Iran. It argues that history demonstrates ...

item.title: First Bank Faces Backlash Over Staff Layoff Method
item.description: First Bank Nigeria don cause wahala online as dem latest layoff method don dey widely discussed. According to social media reports, di bank bring new non-core staff go some branches, make the old non-...

item.title: Bellarmine Mugabe to Apply for Bail in Johannesburg Shooting Case
item.description: Bellarmine Mugabe, son of the late former Zimbabwean president, along with his co-accused Tobias Matonhodze, is set to apply for bail at the Alexandra Magistrate's Court in Johannesburg. The two face ...

item.title: Dateline Resources Expands Music Valley Rare Earths Project in California
item.description: Dateline Resources has significantly expanded its Music Valley project in California by lodging 969 new claims, increasing the total footprint to 1,026 contiguous claims covering 20,520 acres—an 1800 ...
